zh.Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne,: 法國奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrix de Bourbon於1213年1月8日出生在法國奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特時，她的父親Archambaud VIII de Bourbon23歲，母親Béatrix de Montluçon17歲。她於1238年與Béraud de Mercoeur VIII在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易梅爾可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1281年在法國利姆辛可雷梅爾可爾享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrix de Bourbon于1213年1月8日出生在法国奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特时，她的父亲Archambaud VIII de Bourbon23岁，母亲Béatrix de Montluçon17岁。她于1238年与Béraud de Mercoeur VIII在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易梅爾可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1281年在法国利姆辛可雷梅爾可爾享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrix de Bourbon was born on 8 January 1213, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, France, her father, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, was 23 and her mother, Béatrix de Montluçon, was 17. She married Béraud de Mercoeur VIII in 1238, in Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died in 1281, in Mercoeur, Corrèze, Limousin, France, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrix de Bourbon est née le 8 janvier 1213, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, France, son père, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Béatrix de Montluçon, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Béraud de Mercoeur VIII en 1238, à Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1281, à Mercoeur, Corrèze, Limousin, France, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrix de Bourbon am 8. Januar 1213 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archambaud VIII de Bourbon 23 und ihre Mutter Béatrix de Montluçon 17. Sie hat 1238 in Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Béraud de Mercoeur VIII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1281 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Mercoeur, Corrèze, Limousin, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix de Bourbon è nata il il 8 gennaio 1213 nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, sua padre, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Béatrix de Montluçon, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Béraud de Mercoeur VIII nel 1238, nel Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1281, nel Mercoeur, Corrèze, Limousin, Francia, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Bourbonが1213年1月8日にフランスアウバーグンアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトで生まれた時，父Archambaud VIII de Bourbonは23歳，母Béatrix de Montluçonは17歳であった。1238年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-ロイアーメルコエウルでBéraud de Mercoeur VIIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1281年にフランスリモウシンコルeズメルコエウルで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Bourbon(이)가 1213년 1월 8일 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archambaud VIII de Bourbon(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrix de Montluçon(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1238년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 하테-로이르 머코우르에서 Béraud de Mercoeur VIII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1281년 프랑스 리모우신 코e즈 머코우르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix de Bourbon nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1213, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix de Montluçon, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Béraud de Mercoeur VIII em 1238, em Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1281, em Mercoeur, Corrèze, Limousin, França, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrix de Bourbon родилась 8 января 1213 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция, её отцу по имени Archambaud VIII de Bourbon было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Béatrix de Montluçon, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Béraud de Mercoeur VIII в 1238 г. в местности миркоеур, хауте-лоир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1281 г. в местности миркоеур, коррeз, лимусин, Франция в возрасте 68 лет.

sm.from 1249 to 1294: mai le 1249 e o'o I le 1294

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrix de Bourbon nació el 8 de enero de 1213, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Béatrix de Montluçon, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Béraud de Mercoeur VIII en 1238, en Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió en 1281, en Mercoeur, Corrèze, Limousin, Francia, a la edad de 68 años.
